IN PORT:
WORKING: ABOUT IFO 6.0 MTONS, LSMGO 0.1 MT
IDLE: ABOUT IFO 3.5 MTONS, LSMGO 0.1 MT
ALL SPEED AND ALL CONSUMPTION FIGURES BASED ON CLEAN BOTTOM ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS "ABOUT".AT SEA PERFORMANCE FIGURES ARE CONSIDERED TO BE FROM SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY AND BY REFERENCE TO PERIODS OF 24 HOURS IN MODERATE WEATHER UPTO/INCLUDING BEAUFORT 4. DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (MEANS SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT LESS THAN 1.25M), NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL.
NO EXTRAPOLATION OF GOOD WEATHER ANALYSIS CAN BE MADE TO OVERALL VOYAGE.
THE WORD "ABOUT" UNDER THIS FIXTURE APPLY TO BOTH "SPEED(S)" AND "CONSUMPTION(S)". IT IS DEFINED AS A TOLERANCE OF 0.5KT ON "SPEED(S)" AND A TOLERANCE OF 5% ON "BUNKER CONSUNPTION(S)".
VSL TO HAVE LIBERTY OF USING DIESEL OIL WHEN START/STOP/SWITCH GENERATOR ENGINE AT SEA, AND WHEN ENTERING/LEAVING PORT, MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW, NARROW OR RESTRICTED WATERS.
VSL IS ALLOWED TO CONSUME EXTRA BUNKER WHEN CLEANING HOLDS/EXCHANGE BALLASTING WATER.
CHARTERERS WARRANT TO SUPPLY BUNKERS TO VESSEL DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS CHARTER WITH SPECIFICATIONS NOT LOWER THAN IFO: 380 CST RMG 35 STANDARD AS PER ISO 8217:2010 / MGO: DMA STANDARD AS PER ISO 8217:2005 AND ALSO TO COMPLY WITH THE LATEST MARPOL 73/78 ALL AND RELEVANT INTERNATIONAL AND LOCAL REGULATIONS AND ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENTS.
CHARTERERS TO COMPLY WITH FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT AS PER THE REQUIREMENTS OF MARPOL ANNEX VI. CHARTERERS TO ARRANGE LOW SUPLHUR IFO/MDO/MGO AT THEIR TIME AND EXPENSES FOR CALLING ALL NORTH AMERICAN/EU PORTS.
All details and figures are about and without guarantee.
